```{r}
# 4. Make labelled boxplot
# ---------------------------------------------------------
dataset_labs <- c(
  "Fixed_0_15_SPID" = "Fixed depth\n0–15 cm",
  "Ap_truncated_0_15" = "Ap truncated\n0–15 cm",
  "Ap_full" = "Full Ap"
)

dataset_cols <- c(
  "Fixed_0_15_SPID" = "#0072B2",
  "Ap_truncated_0_15" = "#009E73",
  "Ap_full" = "#D55E00"
)

p_box_letters <- ggplot(plot_long, aes(x = dataset, y = value, fill = dataset)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.35, width = 0.72) +
  geom_text(
    data = letters_plot_ap,
    aes(x = dataset, y = y_pos, label = letters),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ nutrient, scales = "free_y", labeller = as_labeller(nutrient_labs)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = dataset_labs) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = dataset_cols) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Observed value",
    title = "Fixed-depth and Ap-based soil fertility comparisons",
    subtitle = "Different letters indicate significant pairwise differences within each nutrient"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 25, l = 15)
  )

p_box_letters

ggsave(
  "../output_do_not_push/ap_vs_depth_boxplots_letters.png",
  p_box_letters,
  width = 11,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)
```
```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Build significance labels
# ---------------------------------------------------------
sig_label <- function(p) {
  case_when(
    is.na(p)      ~ "ns",
    p <= 0.001    ~ "***",
    p <= 0.01     ~ "**",
    p <= 0.05     ~ "*",
    TRUE          ~ "ns"
  )
}

sig_df <- bind_rows(
  fixed_vs_trunc %>%
    transmute(
      nutrient,
      group1 = "Fixed_0_15_SPID",
      group2 = "Ap_truncated_0_15",
      test_code = "RS",
      p_adj = wilcox_p_adj_BH
    ),
  fixed_vs_full %>%
    transmute(
      nutrient,
      group1 = "Fixed_0_15_SPID",
      group2 = "Ap_full",
      test_code = "RS",
      p_adj = wilcox_p_adj_BH
    ),
  paired_tests %>%
    transmute(
      nutrient,
      group1 = "Ap_truncated_0_15",
      group2 = "Ap_full",
      test_code = "SR",
      p_adj = wilcox_p_adj_BH
    )
    ) %>%
 mutate(sig = sig_label(p_adj),
        label = paste(test_code, sig)) %>%
  filter(sig != "ns")

sig_df

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Set factor order
# ---------------------------------------------------------
dataset_levels <- c("Fixed_0_15_SPID", "Ap_truncated_0_15", "Ap_full")

plot_long2 <- plot_long %>%
  mutate(dataset = factor(dataset, levels = dataset_levels))

sig_df <- sig_df %>%
  mutate(
    group1 = factor(group1, levels = dataset_levels),
    group2 = factor(group2, levels = dataset_levels)
  )

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Build y positions for brackets
# ---------------------------------------------------------
panel_ranges <- plot_long2 %>%
  group_by(nutrient) %>%
  summarise(
    y_max = max(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_min = min(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_span = y_max - y_min,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

sig_plot_df <- sig_df %>%
  left_join(panel_ranges, by = "nutrient") %>%
  group_by(nutrient) %>%
  arrange(group1, group2, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    bracket_level = row_number(),
    y = y_max + bracket_level * 0.08 * ifelse(y_span == 0, 1, y_span),
    x1 = as.numeric(group1),
    x2 = as.numeric(group2),
    x_mid = (x1 + x2) / 2
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

sig_plot_df

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Plot with brackets
# ---------------------------------------------------------
dataset_labs <- c(
  "Fixed_0_15_SPID" = "Fixed depth\n0–15 cm",
  "Ap_truncated_0_15" = "Ap truncated\n0–15 cm",
  "Ap_full" = "Full Ap"
)

dataset_cols <- c(
  "Fixed_0_15_SPID" = "#0072B2",
  "Ap_truncated_0_15" = "#009E73",
  "Ap_full" = "#D55E00"
)

p_box_brackets <- ggplot(plot_long2, aes(x = dataset, y = value, fill = dataset)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.35, width = 0.72) +
  
  # bracket verticals
  geom_segment(
    data = sig_plot_df,
    aes(x = x1, xend = x1, y = y - 0.02 * y_span, yend = y),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = sig_plot_df,
    aes(x = x2, xend = x2, y = y - 0.02 * y_span, yend = y),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  # bracket top
  geom_segment(
    data = sig_plot_df,
    aes(x = x1, xend = x2, y = y, yend = y),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  # bracket label
  geom_text(
    data = sig_plot_df,
    aes(x = x_mid, y = y + 0.04 * y_span, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.3,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ nutrient, scales = "free_y", labeller = as_labeller(nutrient_labs)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = dataset_labs) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = dataset_cols) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Observed value",
    title = "Fixed-depth and Ap-based soil fertility comparisons",
    subtitle = "RS = Wilcoxon rank-sum; SR = Wilcoxon signed-rank",
    caption = "* p ≤ 0.05   ** p ≤ 0.01   *** p ≤ 0.001"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
  legend.position = "none",
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
  strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 25, l = 15),
  plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 1, size = 10))

p_box_brackets

ggsave(
  "../output_do_not_push/ap_vs_depth_boxplots_brackets.png",
  p_box_brackets,
  width = 12,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)
```
```{r}
# fixed_15 already loaded
soil_vars <- c("lbc_1", "lb_ceq", "p_h_2", "ca", "k", "mg", "mn", "p", "zn")

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Standardize Perry fixed-depth support data
#    SPID = single point, CID = composite
# ---------------------------------------------------------
perry_surface <- fixed_15 %>%
  transmute(
    point = as.character(PointLabel),
    type = type,
    lbc_1 = `LBC.1`,
    lb_ceq = LBCeq,
    p_h_2 = `pH.2`,
    ca = Ca,
    k = K,
    mg = Mg,
    mn = Mn,
    p = P,
    zn = Zn,
    x,
    y
  ) %>%
  filter(type %in% c("SPID", "CID"))

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Check pairing structure
# ---------------------------------------------------------
pair_check <- perry_surface %>%
  count(point, type) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = type, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

pair_check

odd_points <- pair_check %>%
  filter(SPID != 1 | CID != 1)

odd_points

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Build paired wide table
# ---------------------------------------------------------
perry_wide <- perry_surface %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = all_of(soil_vars),
    names_glue = "{.value}_{type}"
  ) %>%
  arrange(point)

perry_wide

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Paired Wilcoxon signed-rank tests by nutrient
# ---------------------------------------------------------
perry_sp_vs_comp <- purrr::map_dfr(soil_vars, function(v) {
  sp <- perry_wide[[paste0(v, "_SPID")]]
  cp <- perry_wide[[paste0(v, "_CID")]]
  
  tmp <- tibble(sp = sp, cp = cp) %>% drop_na()
  
  wt <- wilcox.test(tmp$sp, tmp$cp, paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE)
  ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(tmp$sp, tmp$cp, method = "spearman", exact = FALSE))
  
  tibble(
    nutrient = v,
    n = nrow(tmp),
    median_sp = median(tmp$sp, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_comp = median(tmp$cp, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_diff = median(tmp$cp - tmp$sp, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_pct_diff = median(ifelse(tmp$sp == 0, NA, 100 * (tmp$cp - tmp$sp) / tmp$sp), na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_abs_diff = mean(abs(tmp$cp - tmp$sp), na.rm = TRUE),
    spearman_rho = unname(ct$estimate),
    spearman_p = ct$p.value,
    wilcox_p = wt$p.value
  )
}) %>%
  mutate(
    wilcox_p_adj_BH = p.adjust(wilcox_p, method = "BH"),
    spearman_p_adj_BH = p.adjust(spearman_p, method = "BH"),
    sig = case_when(
      wilcox_p_adj_BH <= 0.001 ~ "***",
      wilcox_p_adj_BH <= 0.01  ~ "**",
      wilcox_p_adj_BH <= 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    )
  )

perry_sp_vs_comp

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Plot data
# ---------------------------------------------------------
plot_long <- perry_surface %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(soil_vars), names_to = "nutrient", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(
    type = factor(type, levels = c("SPID", "CID"))
  )

nutrient_labs <- c(
  ca = "Calcium (Ca)",
  k = "Potassium (K)",
  lb_ceq = "LBCeq",
  lbc_1 = "LBC",
  mg = "Magnesium (Mg)",
  mn = "Manganese (Mn)",
  p = "Phosphorus (P)",
  p_h_2 = "pH",
  zn = "Zinc (Zn)"
)

type_labs <- c(
  "SPID" = "Single point 0–15 cm",
  "CID"  = "Composite 0–15 cm"
)

type_cols <- c(
  "SPID" = "#0072B2",
  "CID"  = "#009E73"
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Bracket labels
# ---------------------------------------------------------
sig_plot_df <- perry_sp_vs_comp %>%
  left_join(
    plot_long %>%
      group_by(nutrient) %>%
      summarise(
        y_max = max(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        y_min = min(value, na.rm = TRUE),
        y_span = y_max - y_min,
        .groups = "drop"
      ),
    by = "nutrient"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    x1 = 1,
    x2 = 2,
    x_mid = 1.5,
    y = y_max + 0.10 * ifelse(y_span == 0, 1, y_span),
    label = sig
  ) %>%
  filter(sig != "ns")

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 7. Figure
# ---------------------------------------------------------
p_perry <- ggplot(plot_long, aes(x = type, y = value, fill = type)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.35, width = 0.72) +
  geom_segment(
    data = sig_plot_df,
    aes(x = x1, xend = x1, y = y - 0.02 * y_span, yend = y),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = sig_plot_df,
    aes(x = x2, xend = x2, y = y - 0.02 * y_span, yend = y),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = sig_plot_df,
    aes(x = x1, xend = x2, y = y, yend = y),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = sig_plot_df,
    aes(x = x_mid, y = y + 0.02 * y_span, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4.2,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ nutrient, scales = "free_y", labeller = as_labeller(nutrient_labs)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = type_labs) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = type_cols) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Observed value",
    title = "Perry cropland: single-point versus composite sampling at 0–15 cm",
    subtitle = "Asterisks indicate paired Wilcoxon signed-rank tests"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 25, l = 15)
  )

p_perry

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 8. Save outputs
# ---------------------------------------------------------
write_csv(perry_sp_vs_comp, "../output_do_not_push/perry_sp_vs_comp_results.csv")
write_csv(perry_wide, "../output_do_not_push/perry_sp_vs_comp_wide.csv")

ggsave(
  "../output_do_not_push/perry_sp_vs_comp_boxplots.png",
  p_perry,
  width = 11,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)


```
```{r}
#Tables for the paper:

#table has nutrients on rows, and columns are the comparisons and data is significances with ***. 
#single point vs composite, single point vs truncated Ap, composite vs truncated Ap.
#can also do composite vs truncated and full ap. 

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 1. helper for stars
# ---------------------------------------------------------
sig_stars <- function(p) {
  case_when(
    is.na(p)    ~ "",
    p <= 0.001  ~ "***",
    p <= 0.01   ~ "**",
    p <= 0.05   ~ "*",
    TRUE        ~ "ns"
  )
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 2. build final cropland comparison table
# ---------------------------------------------------------
cropland_table <- full_join(
  perry_sp_vs_comp %>%
    transmute(
      nutrient,
      `SP vs COMP (0–15)` = sig_stars(wilcox_p_adj_BH)
    ),
  sp_vs_trunc %>%
    transmute(
      nutrient,
      `SP vs Ap 0–15` = sig_stars(wilcox_p_adj_BH)
    ),
  by = "nutrient"
) %>%
  full_join(
    sp_vs_full %>%
      transmute(
        nutrient,
        `SP vs Full Ap` = sig_stars(wilcox_p_adj_BH)
      ),
    by = "nutrient"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    fixed_vs_trunc %>%
      transmute(
        nutrient,
        `COMP vs Ap 0–15` = sig_stars(wilcox_p_adj_BH)
      ),
    by = "nutrient"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    fixed_vs_full %>%
      transmute(
        nutrient,
        `COMP vs Full Ap` = sig_stars(wilcox_p_adj_BH)
      ),
    by = "nutrient"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    nutrient = factor(
      nutrient,
      levels = c("ca", "k", "lb_ceq", "lbc_1", "mg", "mn", "p", "p_h_2", "zn")
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(nutrient)

cropland_table

cropland_table_stars <- cropland_table %>%
  mutate(
    nutrient = case_when(
      nutrient == "ca"     ~ "Calcium (Ca)",
      nutrient == "k"      ~ "Potassium (K)",
      nutrient == "lb_ceq" ~ "LBCeq",
      nutrient == "lbc_1"  ~ "LBC",
      nutrient == "mg"     ~ "Magnesium (Mg)",
      nutrient == "mn"     ~ "Manganese (Mn)",
      nutrient == "p"      ~ "Phosphorus (P)",
      nutrient == "p_h_2"  ~ "pH",
      nutrient == "zn"     ~ "Zinc (Zn)",
      TRUE ~ as.character(nutrient)
    )
  )

cropland_table_stars

cropland_table_full <- full_join(
  perry_sp_vs_comp %>%
    transmute(
      nutrient,
      `SP vs COMP (0–15)` = sig_stars(wilcox_p_adj_BH),
      `SP vs COMP p_adj` = signif(wilcox_p_adj_BH, 3)
    ),
  sp_vs_trunc %>%
    transmute(
      nutrient,
      `SP vs Ap 0–15` = sig_stars(wilcox_p_adj_BH),
      `SP vs Ap 0–15 p_adj` = signif(wilcox_p_adj_BH, 3)
    ),
  by = "nutrient"
) %>%
  full_join(
    sp_vs_full %>%
      transmute(
        nutrient,
        `SP vs Full Ap` = sig_stars(wilcox_p_adj_BH),
        `SP vs Full Ap p_adj` = signif(wilcox_p_adj_BH, 3)
      ),
    by = "nutrient"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    fixed_vs_trunc %>%
      transmute(
        nutrient,
        `COMP vs Ap 0–15` = sig_stars(wilcox_p_adj_BH),
        `COMP vs Ap 0–15 p_adj` = signif(wilcox_p_adj_BH, 3)
      ),
    by = "nutrient"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    fixed_vs_full %>%
      transmute(
        nutrient,
        `COMP vs Full Ap` = sig_stars(wilcox_p_adj_BH),
        `COMP vs Full Ap p_adj` = signif(wilcox_p_adj_BH, 3)
      ),
    by = "nutrient"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    nutrient = factor(
      nutrient,
      levels = c("ca", "k", "lb_ceq", "lbc_1", "mg", "mn", "p", "p_h_2", "zn")
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(nutrient)

cropland_table_full

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# helper to format adjusted p-values with stars
# ---------------------------------------------------------
fmt_p <- function(p) {
  stars <- dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p)    ~ "",
    p <= 0.001  ~ "***",
    p <= 0.01   ~ "**",
    p <= 0.05   ~ "*",
    TRUE        ~ ""
  )
  
  p_txt <- dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p)  ~ NA_character_,
    p < 0.001 ~ format(p, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3),
    TRUE      ~ format(round(p, 4), nsmall = 4, trim = TRUE)
  )
  
  paste0(p_txt, stars)
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# cropland comparison table: nutrients on rows, comparisons on columns
# ---------------------------------------------------------
cropland_table_p <- full_join(
  perry_sp_vs_comp %>%
    transmute(
      nutrient,
      `SP vs COMP (0–15)` = fmt_p(wilcox_p_adj_BH)
    ),
  sp_vs_trunc %>%
    transmute(
      nutrient,
      `SP vs Ap 0–15` = fmt_p(wilcox_p_adj_BH)
    ),
  by = "nutrient"
) %>%
  full_join(
    sp_vs_full %>%
      transmute(
        nutrient,
        `SP vs Full Ap` = fmt_p(wilcox_p_adj_BH)
      ),
    by = "nutrient"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    fixed_vs_trunc %>%
      transmute(
        nutrient,
        `COMP vs Ap 0–15` = fmt_p(wilcox_p_adj_BH)
      ),
    by = "nutrient"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    fixed_vs_full %>%
      transmute(
        nutrient,
        `COMP vs Full Ap` = fmt_p(wilcox_p_adj_BH)
      ),
    by = "nutrient"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    nutrient = factor(
      nutrient,
      levels = c("ca", "k", "lb_ceq", "lbc_1", "mg", "mn", "p", "p_h_2", "zn")
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(nutrient) %>%
  mutate(
    nutrient = case_when(
      nutrient == "ca"     ~ "Calcium (Ca)",
      nutrient == "k"      ~ "Potassium (K)",
      nutrient == "lb_ceq" ~ "LBCeq",
      nutrient == "lbc_1"  ~ "LBC",
      nutrient == "mg"     ~ "Magnesium (Mg)",
      nutrient == "mn"     ~ "Manganese (Mn)",
      nutrient == "p"      ~ "Phosphorus (P)",
      nutrient == "p_h_2"  ~ "pH",
      nutrient == "zn"     ~ "Zinc (Zn)",
      TRUE ~ as.character(nutrient)
    )
  )

cropland_table_p

library(kableExtra)

cropland_table_p %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Adjusted p-values for cropland sampling comparisons by nutrient",
    align = "lccccc",
    booktabs = TRUE
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, position = "center") %>%
  footnote(
    general = "Values are Benjamini–Hochberg adjusted p-values. SP vs COMP was evaluated with paired Wilcoxon signed-rank tests; SP/COMP vs Ap comparisons were evaluated with Wilcoxon rank-sum tests.",
    general_title = "Note: "
  )

```


```{r}

nutrient_labs <- c(
  ca     = "Calcium (Ca)",
  k      = "Potassium (K)",
  lb_ceq = "LBCeq",
  lbc_1  = "LBC",
  mg     = "Magnesium (Mg)",
  mn     = "Manganese (Mn)",
  p      = "Phosphorus (P)",
  p_h_2  = "pH",
  zn     = "Zinc (Zn)"
)

site_labs <- c(
  "Midville"     = "Midville",
  "Tifton"       = "Tifton",
  "Watkinsville" = "Watkinsville",
  "ROME"         = "Rome",
  "Perry"        = "Perry"
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Forage: use location-level repeated table already built
# repeated_long has SP_mean, COMP_0_10, COMP_10_20
# ---------------------------------------------------------
forage_harmonized <- repeated_long %>%
  filter(sample_support %in% c("SP_mean", "COMP_0_10")) %>%
  mutate(
    location_id = as.character(location_id),
    land_use = "Forage",
    support = case_when(
      sample_support == "SP_mean" ~ "SP",
      sample_support == "COMP_0_10" ~ "COMP"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(site, location_id, nutrient, support, value, land_use)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Cropland: use Perry SPID and CID
# ---------------------------------------------------------
cropland_harmonized <- perry_surface %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(soil_vars), names_to = "nutrient", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(
    site = "Perry",
    land_use = "Cropland",
    support = case_when(
      type == "SPID" ~ "SP",
      type == "CID" ~ "COMP"
    ),
    location_id = as.character(point)
  ) %>%
  select(site, location_id, nutrient, support, value, land_use)

# combined
cross_dat <- bind_rows(forage_harmonized, cropland_harmonized) %>%
  mutate(
    nutrient = factor(nutrient, levels = names(nutrient_labs)),
    support = factor(support, levels = c("SP","COMP")),
    land_use = factor(land_use, levels = c("Forage","Cropland"))
  )

# Coastal Plain subset
coastal_plain_dat <- cross_dat %>%
  filter(site %in% c("Midville", "Tifton", "Perry")) %>%
  mutate(
    region_group = case_when(
      site %in% c("Midville", "Tifton") ~ "Forage Coastal Plain",
      site == "Perry" ~ "Cropland Coastal Plain"
    )
  )

site_cols <- c(
  "SP" = "#0072B2",
  "COMP" = "#009E73"
)

p_all_sites <- cross_dat %>%
  mutate(
    site = factor(site, levels = c("ROME","Watkinsville","Midville","Tifton","Perry"))
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = site, y = value, fill = support)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    width = 0.7,
    outlier.alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ nutrient, scales = "free_y", labeller = as_labeller(nutrient_labs)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = site_labs) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_cols) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Observed value",
    fill = "Support",
    title = "Single-point and composite fertility values across forage and cropland sites",
    subtitle = "Shown for visual context only; differences may also reflect year, management history, and site-specific conditions"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

p_all_sites

ggsave(
  "../output_do_not_push/fig_all_sites_SP_COMP_context.png",
  p_all_sites,
  width = 12,
  height = 8.5,
  dpi = 300
)

coastal_plain_tests <- coastal_plain_dat %>%
  group_by(nutrient, support) %>%
  wilcox_test(value ~ region_group) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(support) %>%
  mutate(p_adj_BH = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    sig = case_when(
      p_adj_BH <= 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_adj_BH <= 0.01  ~ "**",
      p_adj_BH <= 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    )
  )

coastal_plain_summary <- coastal_plain_dat %>%
  group_by(region_group, nutrient, support) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median = median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

coastal_plain_tests
coastal_plain_summary

cp_cols <- c(
  "Forage Coastal Plain" = "#009E73",
  "Cropland Coastal Plain" = "#D55E00"
)

p_cp <- coastal_plain_dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = region_group, y = value, fill = region_group)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.72, outlier.alpha = 0.3) +
  facet_grid(support ~ nutrient, scales = "free_y", labeller = labeller(nutrient = as_labeller(nutrient_labs))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cp_cols) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Observed value",
    title = "Coastal Plain comparison of forage and cropland fertility values",
    subtitle = "Midville + Tifton pooled as forage Coastal Plain; Perry shown as cropland Coastal Plain"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

p_cp

ggsave(
  "../output_do_not_push/fig_coastal_plain_forage_vs_cropland.png",
  p_cp,
  width = 12,
  height = 8.5,
  dpi = 300
)

landuse_tests <- cross_dat %>%
  group_by(nutrient, support) %>%
  wilcox_test(value ~ land_use) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(support) %>%
  mutate(p_adj_BH = p.adjust(p, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    sig = case_when(
      p_adj_BH <= 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_adj_BH <= 0.01  ~ "**",
      p_adj_BH <= 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    )
  )

landuse_summary <- cross_dat %>%
  group_by(land_use, nutrient, support) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median = median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

landuse_tests
landuse_summary

landuse_cols <- c(
  "Forage" = "#009E73",
  "Cropland" = "#D55E00"
)

p_landuse <- cross_dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = land_use, y = value, fill = land_use)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.72, outlier.alpha = 0.3) +
  facet_grid(support ~ nutrient, scales = "free_y", labeller = labeller(nutrient = as_labeller(nutrient_labs))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = landuse_cols) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Observed value",
    title = "Forage versus cropland fertility comparisons by support",
    subtitle = "Comparisons are contextual only; differences may also reflect year, grid design, management history, and unmeasured external drivers"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

p_landuse

ggsave(
  "../output_do_not_push/fig_forage_vs_cropland_by_support.png",
  p_landuse,
  width = 12,
  height = 8.5,
  dpi = 300
)

fmt_p <- function(p) {
  stars <- dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p)    ~ "",
    p <= 0.001  ~ "***",
    p <= 0.01   ~ "**",
    p <= 0.05   ~ "*",
    TRUE        ~ ""
  )
  
  p_txt <- dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p)  ~ NA_character_,
    p < 0.001 ~ format(p, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3),
    TRUE      ~ format(round(p, 4), nsmall = 4, trim = TRUE)
  )
  
  paste0(p_txt, stars)
}

landuse_table <- full_join(
  landuse_tests %>%
    filter(support == "SP") %>%
    transmute(nutrient, `Forage vs Cropland SP` = fmt_p(p_adj_BH)),
  landuse_tests %>%
    filter(support == "COMP") %>%
    transmute(nutrient, `Forage vs Cropland COMP` = fmt_p(p_adj_BH)),
  by = "nutrient"
) %>%
  full_join(
    coastal_plain_tests %>%
      filter(support == "SP") %>%
      transmute(nutrient, `Coastal Plain SP` = fmt_p(p_adj_BH)),
    by = "nutrient"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    coastal_plain_tests %>%
      filter(support == "COMP") %>%
      transmute(nutrient, `Coastal Plain COMP` = fmt_p(p_adj_BH)),
    by = "nutrient"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    nutrient = case_when(
      nutrient == "ca"     ~ "Calcium (Ca)",
      nutrient == "k"      ~ "Potassium (K)",
      nutrient == "lb_ceq" ~ "LBCeq",
      nutrient == "lbc_1"  ~ "LBC",
      nutrient == "mg"     ~ "Magnesium (Mg)",
      nutrient == "mn"     ~ "Manganese (Mn)",
      nutrient == "p"      ~ "Phosphorus (P)",
      nutrient == "p_h_2"  ~ "pH",
      nutrient == "zn"     ~ "Zinc (Zn)",
      TRUE ~ as.character(nutrient)
    )
  )

landuse_table
```

```{r}
nutrient_labs <- c(
  ca     = "Calcium (Ca)",
  k      = "Potassium (K)",
  lb_ceq = "LBCeq",
  lbc_1  = "LBC",
  mg     = "Magnesium (Mg)",
  mn     = "Manganese (Mn)",
  p      = "Phosphorus (P)",
  p_h_2  = "pH",
  zn     = "Zinc (Zn)"
)

support_cols <- c(
  "SP" = "#0072B2",
  "COMP" = "#009E73"
)

cross_plot <- cross_dat %>%
  mutate(
    nutrient = factor(nutrient, levels = names(nutrient_labs)),
    site = factor(site, levels = c("ROME", "Watkinsville", "Midville", "Tifton", "Perry")),
    land_use = factor(land_use, levels = c("Forage", "Cropland")),
    value_plot = if_else(as.character(nutrient) == "p_h_2", value, log1p(value))
  )

p_all_sites <- ggplot(cross_plot, aes(x = site, y = value_plot, fill = support)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    width = 0.7,
    outlier.alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ nutrient, scales = "free_y", labeller = as_labeller(nutrient_labs)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = support_cols) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(
    "ROME" = "Rome",
    "Watkinsville" = "Watkinsville",
    "Midville" = "Midville",
    "Tifton" = "Tifton",
    "Perry" = "Perry"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Observed value (log1p-transformed except pH)",
    fill = "Support",
    title = "Single-point and composite fertility values across forage and cropland sites",
    subtitle = "Shown for visual context only; differences may also reflect year, management history, and site-specific conditions"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

p_all_sites

make_letters <- function(df) {
  comps <- df %>%
    transmute(
      comparison = paste(group1, group2, sep = "-"),
      p.adj = p.adj
    )
  
  pvec <- comps$p.adj
  names(pvec) <- comps$comparison
  
  letters <- multcompView::multcompLetters(pvec, threshold = 0.05)$Letters
  
  tibble(
    grp = names(letters),
    letters = letters
  )
}

coastal_plot <- cross_plot %>%
  filter(site %in% c("Midville", "Tifton", "Perry")) %>%
  mutate(
    grp = interaction(site, support, sep = "_"),
    grp = factor(
      grp,
      levels = c(
        "Midville_SP", "Midville_COMP",
        "Tifton_SP", "Tifton_COMP",
        "Perry_SP", "Perry_COMP"
      )
    )
  )

# Dunn tests across the 6 Coastal Plain site-support groups, by nutrient
cp_dunn <- coastal_plot %>%
  group_by(nutrient) %>%
  dunn_test(value_plot ~ grp, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
  ungroup()

cp_letters <- cp_dunn %>%
  group_by(nutrient) %>%
  group_modify(~ make_letters(.x)) %>%
  ungroup()

# positions for letters
cp_pos <- coastal_plot %>%
  group_by(nutrient, grp) %>%
  summarise(
    y_pos = max(value_plot, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.08 * diff(range(value_plot, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cp_letters_plot <- cp_letters %>%
  left_join(cp_pos, by = c("nutrient", "grp")) %>%
  separate(grp, into = c("site", "support"), sep = "_") %>%
  mutate(
    site = factor(site, levels = c("Midville", "Tifton", "Perry")),
    support = factor(support, levels = c("SP", "COMP")),
    x = c(
      "Midville_SP" = 1 - 0.2,
      "Midville_COMP" = 1 + 0.2,
      "Tifton_SP" = 2 - 0.2,
      "Tifton_COMP" = 2 + 0.2,
      "Perry_SP" = 3 - 0.2,
      "Perry_COMP" = 3 + 0.2
    )[paste(site, support, sep = "_")]
  )

p_cp_sites <- ggplot(coastal_plot, aes(x = site, y = value_plot, fill = support)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    width = 0.7,
    outlier.alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = cp_letters_plot,
    aes(x = as.numeric(x), y = y_pos, label = letters),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4.2,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ nutrient, scales = "free_y", labeller = as_labeller(nutrient_labs)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = support_cols) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Observed value (log1p-transformed except pH)",
    fill = "Support",
    title = "Coastal Plain comparison of forage and cropland sites",
    subtitle = "Midville, Tifton, and Perry shown separately; letters indicate significant differences among site-support groups"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 25, l = 15)
  )

p_cp_sites

landuse_plot <- cross_plot %>%
  mutate(
    grp = interaction(land_use, support, sep = "_"),
    grp = factor(
      grp,
      levels = c("Forage_SP", "Forage_COMP", "Cropland_SP", "Cropland_COMP")
    )
  )

lu_dunn <- landuse_plot %>%
  group_by(nutrient) %>%
  dunn_test(value_plot ~ grp, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
  ungroup()

lu_letters <- lu_dunn %>%
  group_by(nutrient) %>%
  group_modify(~ make_letters(.x)) %>%
  ungroup()

lu_pos <- landuse_plot %>%
  group_by(nutrient, grp) %>%
  summarise(
    y_pos = max(value_plot, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.08 * diff(range(value_plot, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

lu_letters_plot <- lu_letters %>%
  left_join(lu_pos, by = c("nutrient", "grp")) %>%
  separate(grp, into = c("land_use", "support"), sep = "_") %>%
  mutate(
    land_use = factor(land_use, levels = c("Forage", "Cropland")),
    support = factor(support, levels = c("SP", "COMP")),
    x = c(
      "Forage_SP" = 1 - 0.2,
      "Forage_COMP" = 1 + 0.2,
      "Cropland_SP" = 2 - 0.2,
      "Cropland_COMP" = 2 + 0.2
    )[paste(land_use, support, sep = "_")]
  )

p_landuse <- ggplot(landuse_plot, aes(x = land_use, y = value_plot, fill = support)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
    width = 0.7,
    outlier.alpha = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = lu_letters_plot,
    aes(x = as.numeric(x), y = y_pos, label = letters),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 4.2,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ nutrient, scales = "free_y", labeller = as_labeller(nutrient_labs)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = support_cols) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Observed value (log1p-transformed except pH)",
    fill = "Support",
    title = "Forage versus cropland fertility values by support",
    subtitle = "Letters indicate significant differences among land use-support groups"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 25, l = 15)
  )

p_landuse

ggsave(
  "../output_do_not_push/fig_all_sites_SP_COMP_context.png",
  p_all_sites,
  width = 12,
  height = 8.5,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  "../output_do_not_push/fig_coastal_plain_sites_SP_COMP.png",
  p_cp_sites,
  width = 12,
  height = 8.5,
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  "../output_do_not_push/fig_forage_vs_cropland_by_support.png",
  p_landuse,
  width = 12,
  height = 8.5,
  dpi = 300
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Descriptive summaries: all sites
# ---------------------------------------------------------
all_sites_summary <- cross_dat %>%
  group_by(site, support, nutrient) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median = median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Coastal Plain summaries
# ---------------------------------------------------------
coastal_plain_summary <- coastal_plain_dat %>%
  group_by(site, support, nutrient) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median = median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Coastal Plain tests
# compares Midville, Tifton, and Perry separately
# ---------------------------------------------------------
coastal_plain_tests <- coastal_plot %>%
  group_by(nutrient) %>%
  dunn_test(value_plot ~ grp, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
  ungroup()

# compact significance letters table
cp_letters_table <- cp_letters %>%
  separate(grp, into = c("site", "support"), sep = "_") %>%
  select(nutrient, site, support, letters) %>%
  arrange(nutrient, site, support)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Land-use summaries
# ---------------------------------------------------------
landuse_summary <- cross_dat %>%
  group_by(land_use, support, nutrient) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median = median(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR = IQR(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Land-use tests
# broader forage vs cropland
# ---------------------------------------------------------
landuse_tests <- landuse_plot %>%
  group_by(nutrient) %>%
  dunn_test(value_plot ~ grp, p.adjust.method = "BH") %>%
  ungroup()

lu_letters_table <- lu_letters %>%
  separate(grp, into = c("land_use", "support"), sep = "_") %>%
  select(nutrient, land_use, support, letters) %>%
  arrange(nutrient, land_use, support)

fmt_p <- function(p) {
  stars <- dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p)    ~ "",
    p <= 0.001  ~ "***",
    p <= 0.01   ~ "**",
    p <= 0.05   ~ "*",
    TRUE        ~ ""
  )
  
  p_txt <- dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p)  ~ NA_character_,
    p < 0.001 ~ format(p, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3),
    TRUE      ~ format(round(p, 4), nsmall = 4, trim = TRUE)
  )
  
  paste0(p_txt, stars)
}

# Coastal Plain p-value table
coastal_plain_p_table <- coastal_plain_tests %>%
  mutate(
    contrast = paste(group1, "vs", group2),
    p_fmt = fmt_p(p.adj)
  ) %>%
  select(nutrient, contrast, p_fmt) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = contrast, values_from = p_fmt) %>%
  arrange(nutrient)

# Land-use p-value table
landuse_p_table <- landuse_tests %>%
  mutate(
    contrast = paste(group1, "vs", group2),
    p_fmt = fmt_p(p.adj)
  ) %>%
  select(nutrient, contrast, p_fmt) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = contrast, values_from = p_fmt) %>%
  arrange(nutrient)

write_csv(all_sites_summary, "../output_do_not_push/all_sites_summary.csv")
write_csv(coastal_plain_summary, "../output_do_not_push/coastal_plain_summary.csv")
write_csv(coastal_plain_tests, "../output_do_not_push/coastal_plain_tests.csv")
write_csv(cp_letters_table, "../output_do_not_push/coastal_plain_letters_table.csv")
write_csv(coastal_plain_p_table, "../output_do_not_push/coastal_plain_p_table.csv")

write_csv(landuse_summary, "../output_do_not_push/landuse_summary.csv")
write_csv(landuse_tests, "../output_do_not_push/landuse_tests.csv")
write_csv(lu_letters_table, "../output_do_not_push/landuse_letters_table.csv")
write_csv(landuse_p_table, "../output_do_not_push/landuse_p_table.csv")

all_sites_summary
coastal_plain_summary
coastal_plain_p_table
cp_letters_table

landuse_summary
landuse_p_table
lu_letters_table
```
```{r}
#both site normality:
# =========================================================
# NORMALITY TABLES: Shapiro-Wilk W + skewness + excess kurtosis
# =========================================================
library(moments)

library(kableExtra)

nutrient_order <- c("ca","k","mg","mn","p","zn","p_h_2","lbc_1","lb_ceq")
nutrient_display <- c(
  ca = "Calcium (Ca)", k = "Potassium (K)", mg = "Magnesium (Mg)",
  mn = "Manganese (Mn)", p = "Phosphorus (P)", zn = "Zinc (Zn)",
  p_h_2 = "pH", lbc_1 = "LBC", lb_ceq = "LBCeq"
)

compute_sw <- function(df, group_name) {
  df %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(nutrient_order), names_to = "nutrient", values_to = "value") %>%
    group_by(nutrient) %>%
    summarise(
      group = group_name,
      n = sum(!is.na(value)),
      W = {
        v <- na.omit(value)
        if (length(v) >= 3 & length(v) <= 5000) round(shapiro.test(v)$statistic, 3) else NA_real_
      },
      skew = round(moments::skewness(value, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
      ex_kurt = round(moments::kurtosis(value, na.rm = TRUE) - 3, 2),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# TABLE 1: FORAGE
# Groups: SP A, SP B, Composite 0-10, Composite 10-20
# ---------------------------------------------------------
forage_sp_a  <- lime_clean %>% filter(type == "A")
forage_sp_b  <- lime_clean %>% filter(type == "B")
forage_c010  <- lime_clean %>% filter(type == "0-4")
forage_c1020 <- lime_clean %>% filter(type == "4-8")

forage_sp_mean <- lime_wide %>%
  transmute(
    ca     = ca_SP_mean,
    k      = k_SP_mean,
    mg     = mg_SP_mean,
    mn     = mn_SP_mean,
    p      = p_SP_mean,
    zn     = zn_SP_mean,
    p_h_2  = p_h_2_SP_mean,
    lbc_1  = lbc_1_SP_mean,
    lb_ceq = lb_ceq_SP_mean
  )

forage_norm <- bind_rows(
  compute_sw(forage_sp_a,    "SP A"),
  compute_sw(forage_sp_b,    "SP B"),
  compute_sw(forage_sp_mean, "SP Mean (A+B)"),      # <-- added
  compute_sw(forage_c010,    "Composite 0–10 cm"),
  compute_sw(forage_c1020,   "Composite 10–20 cm")
) %>%
  mutate(
    nutrient = factor(nutrient, levels = nutrient_order),
    cell = paste0(W, " (", skew, ", ", ex_kurt, ")")
  ) %>%
  select(nutrient, group, cell) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = cell) %>%
  arrange(nutrient) %>%
  mutate(nutrient = nutrient_display[as.character(nutrient)])

forage_norm %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Forage: Shapiro-Wilk W statistic by sampling type and nutrient (skewness, excess kurtosis in parentheses)",
    align = "lccccc",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    col.names = c("Nutrient", "SP A", "SP B", "SP Mean (A+B)",
                  "Composite 0–10 cm", "Composite 10–20 cm")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, font_size = 11) %>%
  footnote(
    general = "W closer to 1.0 indicates greater conformity to normality. Values in parentheses are skewness and excess kurtosis. Log1p-transformed values used for all nutrients except pH.",
    general_title = "Note: "
  )
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# TABLE 2: CROPLAND (Perry)
# Groups: SP (SPID), Composite (CID), Ap truncated 0-15, Full Ap
# ---------------------------------------------------------
perry_spid <- fixed_152   # already filtered to SPID in PERRY chunk
perry_cid  <- fixed_15 %>%
  filter(type == "CID") %>%
  transmute(
    ca = Ca, k = K, mg = Mg, mn = Mn, p = P, zn = Zn,
    p_h_2 = `pH.2`, lbc_1 = `LBC.1`, lb_ceq = LBCeq
  )

# apply same log1p transform before testing (match your density plots)
log_transform <- function(df) {
  df %>% mutate(across(all_of(setdiff(nutrient_order, "p_h_2")), ~ log1p(.)))
}

cropland_norm <- bind_rows(
  compute_sw(log_transform(perry_spid),   "Fixed depth SP (0–15 cm)"),
  compute_sw(log_transform(perry_cid),    "Composite (0–15 cm)"),
  compute_sw(log_transform(ap_trunc2),    "Ap truncated 0–15 cm"),
  compute_sw(log_transform(ap_full_point),"Full Ap")
) %>%
  mutate(
    nutrient = factor(nutrient, levels = nutrient_order),
    cell = paste0(W, " (", skew, ", ", ex_kurt, ")")
  ) %>%
  select(nutrient, group, cell) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = cell) %>%
  arrange(nutrient) %>%
  mutate(nutrient = nutrient_display[as.character(nutrient)])

cropland_norm %>%
  kbl(
    caption = "Cropland: Shapiro-Wilk W statistic by sampling type and nutrient (skewness, excess kurtosis in parentheses)",
    align = "lcccc",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    col.names = c("Nutrient", "Fixed depth SP (0–15 cm)", "Composite (0–15 cm)",
                  "Ap truncated 0–15 cm", "Full Ap")
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, font_size = 11) %>%
  footnote(
    general = "W closer to 1.0 indicates greater conformity to normality. Values in parentheses are skewness and excess kurtosis. Log1p-transformed values used for all nutrients except pH.",
    general_title = "Note: "
  )

# Save both as CSV too
write_csv(forage_norm,   "../output_do_not_push/normality_table_forage.csv")
write_csv(cropland_norm, "../output_do_not_push/normality_table_cropland.csv")

# Composite sampling consistently produced W values closer to 1.0 and skewness/kurtosis closer to 0 than single-point across both datasets, supporting the visual observation from the density plots. This is most pronounced for Zinc and LBC, where the difference is dramatic.
```
